title: Reports & Exports
subtitle: AI-generated reports and data exports
qa_question: What do recent forecast and inventory reports indicate? Highlight anomalies planners should review.
executive_report_description: The AI-powered demand forecasting platform delivered exceptional results in Q4 2024. With 94.5% forecast accuracy, the system enabled a 25% reduction in inventory holding costs while improving product availability. Stock-out incidents decreased by 30%, contributing to an 18% increase in sales revenue compared to the previous quarter.
